headline: Rivian Automotive (RIVN) Is Up 6.3% After Reaffirming 2026 Deliveries And Securing VW Software Deal
summary: In early April 2026, Rivian Automotive reported first-quarter production of 10,236 vehicles and deliveries of 10,365 vehicles from its Normal, Illinois plant, while reaffirming its 2026 delivery guidance of 62,000 to 67,000 vehicles. At the same time, Rivian secured large-scale technology and autonomy collaborations with Volkswagen and Uber, signaling a push to build recurring, higher-margin software and services revenue alongside its core vehicle business.
